name: Beetroot nitrate
summary: Decision-ready summary: Beetroot nitrate is best framed for endurance performance; blood pressure support; nitric oxide support; safety screen: hypotension; PDE-5 inhibitors/nitrate medication caution; kidney stone susceptibility.
description: Beetroot nitrate supports endurance; blood flow; blood pressure with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Nitrate-rich beetroot can lower blood pressure, but the evidence base on negative effects and clinically significant medication interactions is limited. Do not infer a nitrate-drug or PDE-5 interaction magnitude from blood-pressure effects alone; people with low blood pressure or relevant medication use should seek individualized review.
